program:
0.340000::has_title('Art. 7 GDPR','Conditions for consent').
0.326667::obligates('controller','demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data').
0.186667::has_title('data subject','be informed prior to giving consent').
0.053333::has_title('data subject','the right to withdraw his or her consent at any time').
0.133333::grants_right('consent','to process personal data').
0.180000::has_title('Art. 7 GDPR','assess whether consent is freely given').
0.006667::has_title('Art. 7 GDPR','infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding').
0.146667::obligates('Art. 7 GDPR','present consent request in a clearly distinguishable manner').
0.173333::obligates('Art. 7 GDPR','use clear and plain language in consent declaration').
0.140000::has_title('consent','be conditional on performance of a contract').
0.013333::has_title('consent','be given in a clearly distinguishable manner').
0.293333::obligates('controller','make it as easy to withdraw as to give consent').
0.106667::has_title('data subject','withdraw as easy as to give consent').
0.253333::has_title('data subject','withdraw consent as easily as giving it').
0.226667::has_title('declaration','any part which constitutes an infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding').
0.066667::has_title('declaration','intelligible and easily accessible form').
0.040000::has_title('declaration','shall be presented in an intelligible and easily accessible form').
0.213333::has_title('declaration','using clear and plain language').
0.233333::obligates('declaration','request for consent shall be presented clearly distinguishable from other matters').
relevant_right(A,R) :- cross_references(A,B), grants_right(B,R).
obligation_with_exception(A,O,E) :- obligates(A,O), has_exception(A,E).
titled_obligation(A,T,O) :- has_title(A,T), obligates(A,O).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','Conditions for consent','present consent request in a clearly distinguishable manner')).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','Conditions for consent','use clear and plain language in consent declaration')).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','assess whether consent is freely given','present consent request in a clearly distinguishable manner')).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','assess whether consent is freely given','use clear and plain language in consent declaration')).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding','present consent request in a clearly distinguishable manner')).
query(titled_obligation('Art. 7 GDPR','infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding','use clear and plain language in consent declaration')).
query(titled_obligation('declaration','any part which constitutes an infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding','request for consent shall be presented clearly distinguishable from other matters')).
query(titled_obligation('declaration','intelligible and easily accessible form','request for consent shall be presented clearly distinguishable from other matters')).
query(titled_obligation('declaration','shall be presented in an intelligible and easily accessible form','request for consent shall be presented clearly distinguishable from other matters')).
query(titled_obligation('declaration','using clear and plain language','request for consent shall be presented clearly distinguishable from other matters')).
